# KPI_ALERT

**Database:** Operational

**Description:** Contains the definition of alerts generated by KPI Alert Rules

## Columns

| Name | Data Type | Nullable | Default | Primary | FK To | Description |
|------|-----------|----------|---------|---------|-------|-------------|
| AlertID | INT(10,0) | False |  | False | ALERT | Link to associated Alert record |
| ID | INT(10,0) | False |  | True |  | Unique identifier of KPI Alert |
| KpiAlertRuleName | NVARCHAR(50) | False |  | False |  | Name of the KPI Alert Rule that created the KPI Alert. Reference to the KPI_ALERT_RULE table. |
| KpiName | NVARCHAR(50) | False |  | False |  | Link to KPI that generated this KPI Alert |
| KpiValueHistoryID | INT(10,0) | True |  | False | KPI_VALUE_HISTORY | Link to KPI Value History record that generated this KPI Alert |

## Primary Key

- **PK_KPI_ALERT** on `ID`

## Foreign Keys (this table -> other)

- **FK_KPI_ALERT_ALERT** — KPI_ALERT -> ALERT (`AlertID -> ID`)
- **FK_KPI_ALERT_KPI_VALUE_HISTORY** — KPI_ALERT -> KPI_VALUE_HISTORY (`KpiValueHistoryID -> ID`)

## Referenced By (other tables -> this)

- **** —  (``)

## Unique Indexes

- **** on ``

## Non-Unique Indexes

- **IF_KPI_ALERT_ALERT** on `AlertID`
- **IF_KPI_ALERT_KPI** on `KpiName`
- **IF_KPI_ALERT_KPI_ALERT_RULE** on `KpiAlertRuleName`
- **IF_KPI_ALERT_KPI_VALUE_HISTORY** on `KpiValueHistoryID`
